sourceCommit: bdfa464 fix: wait for anonymous auth before api calls

cloudBuild.supersededReason: The image was built without the production Vite Firebase/Maps build args, so it was replaced before final evidence.

screenshots.description: Fresh public report flow with a synthetic waffle negative-test image before Gemini triage.
Deployed Gemini triage returns the low-confidence clarification screen for non-civic waffle evidence before saving.
Authenticated Cloud Run console evidence for revision civiclens-00044-d5l at 100 percent traffic; deployer email redacted.

carryForwardEvidence.description: Full lifecycle app evidence captured on revision civiclens-00041-m2n before the final auth/non-civic patch.
Sanitized CLI/API-backed Firebase, Secret Manager, Auth provider, and Maps key metadata evidence. It contains no secret values.
